steps.prompt: These letters all start the same way — with a round curve going anti-clockwise. Find c and trace it — start at the top and go round!
steps.feedback: c! That curving stroke is the key. Now find o — all the way round!
o! A full circle, anti-clockwise. Now find a — it starts just like c!
a! Round first, then the straight bit down. Now find d — round first, then tall!
d! Same round start, but the line goes up high. Last one — find g!
g! Round like the others, then the tail dips below. You mastered the round letters!
